meta.phase-name: Content Schema File + Test Mode Loop

phase-summary.outcome: Space Explorer now exposes content schema authoring language directly and provides a quick build-plus-playthrough loop for fresh iteration inside the UI.

file.description: Added Content Schema File naming updates, JSON schema structure updates (`stats` object + inheritance metadata), and quick test mode action wiring.
Added phase 51 for content-schema test-mode execution.
Added phase 51 tasks and statuses for execution and follow-up storage planning.
Registered phase-51 agent ownership and moved current phase/plan to 51-01.

decision.summary: Content schema output and labels now prioritize content authoring language over generic model-schema terminology.
decision.impact: Improves workflow clarity for inheritance and relationship design in authoring UI.

decision.summary: Quick test mode now runs build-bundle and browser playthrough in one action and binds resulting report to generated pack identity.
decision.impact: Enables faster validation loops before persistent upload workflows are added.

next.action: Execute 51-03 by defining and implementing Supabase/S3 storage contracts for bundle/report pull-push and indexing.
